title: Audience Personas
intro: These personas represent CalmCove's two highest-potential audience groups: students navigating academic overload and young professionals balancing ambition with emotional fatigue.

items.name: Ayla Morgan
items.lifestyle: Full-time university student juggling coursework, a part-time retail job, and a busy social life.
painPoints: Difficulty focusing after long screen time
items.purchaseBehavior: Ayla signs up after free trials, student discounts, or strong peer recommendations. She wants proof that a tool will help immediately.
items.narrative: Ayla wants emotional relief that works between classes, study sessions, and late-night stress. She values brands that feel gentle, aesthetic, and practical.
items.imageAlt: Student persona portrait illustration for Ayla Morgan.

items.name: Noah Patel
items.lifestyle: Young marketing coordinator managing a hybrid schedule, side projects, gym goals, and constant notifications.
painPoints: Difficulty switching from stress to rest
goals: Adopt calm habits that fit a full schedule
items.purchaseBehavior: Noah pays for tools that feel efficient, polished, and credible. He responds to case-based proof, expert positioning, and frictionless onboarding.
items.narrative: Noah wants a calm productivity ritual that helps him stay composed and clear-headed without asking for major lifestyle changes.
items.imageAlt: Young professional persona portrait illustration for Noah Patel.
